description: A hands-on course on Kubernetes multi-container Pod patterns, covering init containers for pre-flight setup and the native sidecar feature introduced in Kubernetes 1.28+.
summary: Learn how init containers guarantee sequential startup prerequisites, how the sidecar pattern extends an application without modifying its image, and how the native sidecar (an init container with restartPolicy: Always) solves the longstanding startup-race and Job-completion problems.
target_audience: Intermediate learners who already understand basic Kubernetes Pod and container concepts.

lectures.title: Kubernetes Init Containers and the Sidecar Pattern
